mapper.select: select id, phone, name, password, image, state from jg_user where phone = #{phone} and password = md5(#{password}) and state = 1
select id,phone,name,image,state from jg_user where name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
mapper.insert: insert into jg_user (phone, name, password, image, state) values (#{phone}, #{name}, md5(#{password}), #{image}, #{state})
